name: Zucchini Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups shredded zucchini (about 2 to 3 small zucchinis)
A lot of freshly ground black pepper
1/2 teaspoon salt (I use garlic and sour cream)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heated skillet with oil, drop the mixture by spoonfuls (about 3 at a time). You may need to spread them out slightly with your spatula.
2. When golden brown on the bottom, gently flip the pancakes using a spatula.
3. Flatten them down a bit if they rise. Serve with sour cream, if desired.
